findings.Title: Spelled-out number breaks lexical ordering
findings.Body: Line 3 replaces a numeric token with a word; downstream consumers sorting these lines will misorder it. Keep the numeral.

findings.Title: Hallucinated anchor that must be dropped
findings.Body: This line does not exist in the diff.

findings.Title: Invalid severity that must be dropped
findings.Body: blocker is not a valid severity.
